member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection
member.summary:
Represents a database collection in the t1yOS cloud database. Provides CRUD operations, advanced queries, and schema management.
All methods delegate to with the appropriate HTTP method and REST path.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.#ctor(T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new T1Collection instance.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.Name
member.summary: Gets the collection name.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.InsertOneAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Inserts a single document into the collection.
member.param: The document data as a dictionary. Must be non-empty.
member.returns: API response with the new document's ObjectID.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.FindByIdAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a document by its ObjectID.
member.returns: API response with the found document.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.UpdateByIdAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Updates a document by its ObjectID.
member.param: The update data. Must be non-empty.
member.returns: API response with the modification count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.DeleteByIdAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a document by its ObjectID.
member.returns: API response with the deletion count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.FindOneAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Finds a single document matching the filter criteria.
member.param: Query filter as a non-empty dictionary.
member.returns: API response with the found document.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.UpdateOneAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Updates a single document matching the filter criteria.
member.param: Query filter to match documents. Must be non-empty.
member.returns: API response with the modification count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.DeleteOneAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Deletes a single document matching the filter criteria.
member.param: Query filter to match documents. Must be non-empty.
member.returns: API response with the deletion count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.InsertManyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}[])
member.summary: Inserts multiple documents into the collection.
member.param: Array of document data dictionaries. Must be non-empty.
member.returns: API response with inserted ObjectIDs and count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.UpdateManyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Updates multiple documents matching the filter criteria.
member.param: Query filter to match documents. Must be non-empty.
member.returns: API response with the modification count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.DeleteManyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Deletes multiple documents matching the filter criteria.
member.param: Query filter to match documents. Must be non-empty.
member.returns: API response with the deletion count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.FindAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Performs a paginated query on the collection.
member.param: Page number (1-based). Default: 1. Throws if less than 1.
Number of items per page. Throws if less than 1 or greater than 100.
member.returns: API response with paginated results.
member.exception: Thrown if page or size are out of range.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.AggregateAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}[])
member.summary: Executes an aggregation pipeline on the collection.
member.param: Array of aggregation pipeline stages. Must be non-empty. Each stage is a dictionary representing a MongoDB aggregation operation.
member.returns: API response with aggregated results.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.CountAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Counts documents matching the optional filter.
member.returns: API response with the document count.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.DistinctAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Gets distinct values for a specified field.
member.param: The field name to get distinct values for.
member.returns: API response with distinct values.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.CreateAsync
member.summary: Creates a new collection (schema) in the database.
member.returns: API response.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.ClearAsync
member.summary: Clears all documents from the collection while keeping the schema.
member.returns: API response with deletedCount in the data.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1Collection.DropAsync
member.summary: Drops the collection (schema and all documents) from the database.
member.returns: API response.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS
P:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.Db
member.summary: Database accessor for collection operations.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.#ctor(T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Creates a new T1YOS client instance.
member.param: Configuration for the client. The following fields are required: AppId (>= 1001), ApiKey (32 chars), SecretKey (32 chars). All other fields have sensible defaults.
Optional for dependency injection and testing. If not provided, an internal HttpClient is created and managed.
member.exception: Thrown if required configuration fields are invalid.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.InitAsync
member.summary:
Initializes the client by syncing with the server. Retrieves the server's Unix timestamp and safe mode setting to correct clock skew and configure encryption.
If the server is unreachable, the client gracefully degrades with defaults (offset = 0, isSafeMode = false) and logs a warning.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.RequestAsync``1(T1YOS.Sdk.Types.HttpMethod,System.String,System.Object,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Executes a generic API request and returns the typed response. This is the core internal method used by all public API methods.
member.typeparam: Expected type of the response data.
member.param: Whether to encrypt the request. Null uses client default.
member.returns: The deserialized API response.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.GetMetaAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves metadata from the server.
member.param: Optional field name to retrieve. If null or empty, returns all metadata.
member.returns: The metadata API response.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.CheckUpdateAsync
member.summary: Checks if a newer version of the SDK is available on the server. Compares the server version with the client's configured version.
member.returns: True if an update is available, false otherwise.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.CallFuncAsync(System.String,System.Object,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary:
Calls a cloud function (.jsc file) on the server.
Function name transformations: - "hello" becomes "hello.jsc" - "dir/" becomes "dir/index.jsc" - "script.js" becomes "script.jsc" - "func.jsc" stays as-is
member.param: Function name. The .jsc extension is auto-appended.
Optional parameters to pass to the function.
Whether to enable safe mode for this call.
member.returns: The cloud function's API response.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.EnsureJscExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Ensures the function name has a .jsc extension. Handles leading slashes, query strings, and hash fragments.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.AssertObjectID(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a string is a valid 24-character hexadecimal ObjectID. Delegates to .

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.IsNonEmptyObject(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a value is a non-empty object (dictionary with at least one key).

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.IsPlainObject(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a value is a plain object (non-null dictionary).

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.IsNonEmptyArrayWithNonEmptyObjects(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a value is a non-empty array of non-empty objects.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.HmacSHA256(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes HMAC-SHA256 of a message using a secret key. Returns the result as a 64-character lowercase hex string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.VerifyHmacSHA256(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies an HMAC-SHA256 signature against the expected value. Uses constant-time comparison.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the client and releases resources. Safe to call multiple times.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.DbAccessor
member.summary: Provides access to database collections.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.DbAccessor.Collection(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a instance for the specified collection name.
member.returns: A for database operations on this collection.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.DbAccessor.GetCollectionsAsync
member.summary: Gets all collections (schemas) from the database.
member.returns: API response with the list of collections.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Client.T1YOS.DbAccessor.ToObjectID(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a hex string to an ObjectID marker.
member.returns: An ObjectID marker string.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants
member.summary: Global constants for the T1YOS SDK.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.DefaultBaseUrl
member.summary: Default base URL for the t1yOS platform.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.MinAppId
member.summary: Minimum valid application ID.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.ApiKeyLength
member.summary: Required length for API keys (32 characters).

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.SecretKeyLength
member.summary: Required length for secret keys (32 characters).

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.DefaultVersion
member.summary: Default API version.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.DefaultTimeFormat
member.summary: Default time format string for timestamp localization.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.DefaultOffset
member.summary: Default time offset in seconds.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.DefaultSafeMode
member.summary: Default safe mode setting.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.MaxTimeDiff
member.summary: Maximum allowed time difference for request signatures (seconds).

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.RequestTimeoutMs
member.summary: Default request timeout in milliseconds (5 minutes).

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.MaxPageSize
member.summary: Maximum page size for paginated queries.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.DefaultPageSize
member.summary: Default page size for paginated queries.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.ObjectIdLength
member.summary: Required length for ObjectID hex strings.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Constants.ApiVersion
member.summary: API version prefix for REST endpoints.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESGCMPayload
member.summary: Represents an AES-256-GCM encrypted payload as exchanged with the t1yOS server.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESGCMPayload.N
member.summary: Base64-encoded nonce (12 bytes).

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESGCMPayload.J
member.summary: Base64-encoded ciphertext.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESGCMPayload.T
member.summary: Base64-encoded authentication tag (16 bytes).

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESHelper
member.summary: AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption utilities for the T1YOS SDK. Used for payload encryption when safe mode is enabled. Uses BouncyCastle with across all target frameworks for consistent behavior.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESHelper.GcmMacSizeBits
member.summary: GCM authentication tag length in bits.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESHelper.NonceLengthBytes
member.summary: Nonce length in bytes.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESHelper.KeyLengthBytes
member.summary: Required AES key length in bytes (256 bits).

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESHelper.EncryptAESGCM(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encrypts a string using AES-256-GCM.
member.returns: A JSON string containing base64-encoded nonce, ciphertext, and tag.
member.exception: Thrown if the key is not exactly 32 bytes.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.AESHelper.DecryptAESGCM(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decrypts an AES-256-GCM encrypted JSON payload.
member.param: The JSON string containing n (nonce), j (ciphertext), and t (tag) fields, all base64-encoded.
member.returns: The decrypted plaintext string.
member.exception: Thrown if the key is not exactly 32 bytes.
Thrown if the JSON payload is malformed.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.HMACHelper
member.summary: HMAC-SHA256 utilities for the T1YOS SDK. Used for request signing and signature verification.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.HMACHelper.HmacSHA256Hex(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes the HMAC-SHA256 of a message using a secret key, returning the result as a lowercase hexadecimal string (64 characters).
member.returns: Lowercase hexadecimal HMAC-SHA256 hash string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.HMACHelper.VerifyHmacSHA256(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies an HMAC-SHA256 signature against the expected value. Uses constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks.
member.returns: True if the signature is valid.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.HMACHelper.BytesToHexStringLower(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Converts a byte array to a lowercase hexadecimal string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.HMACHelper.ConstantTimeEquals(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs a constant-time comparison of two strings. Mitigates timing side-channel attacks.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SHA256Helper
member.summary: SHA-256 hashing utilities for the T1YOS SDK. Provides hex-encoded SHA-256 digest computation.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SHA256Helper.Sha256Hex(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of a string and returns it as a lowercase hexadecimal string (64 characters).
member.returns: Lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 hash string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SHA256Helper.BytesToHexStringLower(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Converts a byte array to a lowercase hexadecimal string.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput
member.summary: Input parameters for request signature generation.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput.Method
member.summary: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE).

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput.PathAndQuery
member.summary: URL path with query string.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput.Body
member.summary: Request body string.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput.AppId
member.summary: Application ID.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput.Timestamp
member.summary: Unix timestamp for the request.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput.SecretKey
member.summary: Secret key for HMAC-SHA256 signing.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignHelper
member.summary:
Request signing utilities for the T1YOS SDK. Generates HMAC-SHA256 signatures used to authenticate API requests.
Signature algorithm:
message = METHOD + "
" + PATH_AND_QUERY + "
" + SHA256(body) + "
" + appId + "
" + timestamp signature = HMAC-SHA256(secretKey, message)

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignHelper.CreateSignature(T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignatureInput)
member.summary: Creates an HMAC-SHA256 request signature.
member.returns: A 64-character lowercase hexadecimal signature string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignHelper.GetSafeTimestamp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a safe Unix timestamp adjusted by the server time offset. The offset is computed during InitAsync() to correct for clock skew between client and server.
member.param: Time offset in seconds (server time - client time).
member.returns: Adjusted Unix timestamp as a string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Crypto.SignHelper.GetUnixTimestampSeconds
member.summary: Gets the current Unix timestamp in seconds. Uses DateTimeOffset.ToUnixTimeSeconds on .NET 5+, falls back to manual calculation on older frameworks.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestOptions
member.summary: Options for executing an HTTP request through the T1YOS API.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestOptions.Method
member.summary: HTTP method.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestOptions.Path
member.summary: API path (e.g., /v5/classes/Users).

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestOptions.Params
member.summary: Request body or query parameters.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestOptions.Encryption
member.summary: Whether to force encryption. Null means use client default.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Request timeout in milliseconds. Null means use default (5 min).

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestExecutor
member.summary: HTTP request execution engine for the T1YOS SDK. Handles URL construction, body serialization, encryption, signing, and header injection for all API requests.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestExecutor.ExecuteRequestAsync``1(T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient,T1YOS.Sdk.Http.RequestOptions)
member.summary: Executes an HTTP request and returns the typed API response. This is the core method that all client operations delegate to.
member.typeparam: Expected type of the response data.
member.returns: The deserialized API response.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.ResponseHandler
member.summary: Response handling utilities for the T1YOS SDK. Handles JSON parsing, safe-mode decryption, timestamp formatting, and error extraction from HTTP responses.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.ResponseHandler.HandleResponseAsync``1(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage,T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig)
member.summary: Processes an HTTP response and returns a typed API response. Handles safe-mode decryption, timestamp formatting, and error extraction.
member.typeparam: Expected type of the response data.
member.param: Client configuration (for decryption keys and time format).
member.returns: The deserialized API response.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.ResponseHandler.ExtractError(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Extracts a from a server error response.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.ResponseHandler.JsonElementToObject(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Converts a to a CLR object (dictionary, array, or primitive).

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Http.ResponseHandler.HandleHttpError(System.Exception)
member.summary: Handles HTTP client exceptions and wraps them in .
member.returns: A wrapping the original exception.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes
member.summary:
Special type marker functions and constants for the t1yOS SDK.
The t1yOS server recognizes special marker strings in JSON request bodies and converts them to native database types (ObjectID, Date, typed numbers, etc.).
Examples:
SpecialTypes.ObjectID("507f1f77bcf86cd799439011") → ObjectID('507f1f77bcf86cd799439011') SpecialTypes.Date_("2024-01-15T10:30:00Z") → Date('2024-01-15T10:30:00Z') SpecialTypes.Integer(42) → Integer(42)

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.ObjectIdPattern
member.summary: ObjectID hex character pattern.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.ObjectID(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an ObjectID marker string for the given hex ID. The ID must be a 24-character hexadecimal string.
member.returns: An ObjectID('...') marker string.
member.exception: Thrown if the ID is not a valid 24-char hex string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Date_(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Date marker string.
member.param: An ISO-8601 date string or other date representation.
member.returns: A Date('...') marker string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.DateTime_(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a DateTime marker string.
member.returns: A DateTime('...') marker string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Timestamp(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Timestamp marker string (Unix timestamp in seconds).
member.returns: A Timestamp('...') marker string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Boolean_(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a Boolean marker string.
member.returns: A Boolean(true) or Boolean(false) marker string (lowercase).

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Integer(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates an Integer marker string.
member.returns: An Integer(...) marker string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Bigint(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a Bigint marker string.
member.returns: A Bigint(...) marker string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Float(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a Float marker string.
member.returns: A Float(...) marker string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Double_(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a Double marker string.
member.returns: A Double(...) marker string.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Array_(System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates an Array marker string. The array elements are serialized as JSON.
member.returns: An Array(...) marker string with JSON body.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Map_(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a Map marker string. The dictionary is serialized as JSON.
member.param: The dictionary to mark as a Map.
member.returns: A Map(...) marker string with JSON body.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.MapArray(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}[])
member.summary: Creates a MapArray marker string. The array of dictionaries is serialized as JSON.
member.param: Array of dictionaries to mark as Map[].
member.returns: A Map[](...) marker string with JSON body.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Null
member.summary: Null marker constant.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.None
member.summary: None marker constant.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Nil
member.summary: Nil marker constant.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Empty
member.summary: Empty string marker constant.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.UNDEFINED
member.summary: UNDEFINED marker constant.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.Undefined
member.summary: Undefined marker constant.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.TimeNow
member.summary: Server-side time.Now() marker.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.TimeNowUnix
member.summary: Server-side time.Now().Unix() marker.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.TimeNowUnixNano
member.summary: Server-side time.Now().UnixNano() marker.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.TimeNowWeekday
member.summary: Server-side time.Now().Weekday() marker.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.TimeNowWeekdayChinese
member.summary: Server-side time.Now().Weekday().Chinese() marker.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.SpecialTypes.SpecialTypes.TimeNowHelper
member.summary: Convenience class for server-side time markers. Provides a fluent-style API: TimeNowHelper.Now(), etc.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Standard API response envelope returned by the t1yOS server.
member.typeparam: Type of the response data payload.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.ApiResponse`1.Code
member.summary: HTTP status code or error code.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.ApiResponse`1.Message
member.summary: Response message from the server.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.ApiResponse`1.Data
member.summary: Response data payload.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InsertResult
member.summary: Result returned after inserting a single document.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InsertResult.ObjectId
member.summary: The ObjectID of the newly inserted document.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InsertManyResult
member.summary: Result returned after inserting multiple documents.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InsertManyResult.ObjectIds
member.summary: Array of ObjectIDs for the inserted documents.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InsertManyResult.InsertedCount
member.summary: Number of documents inserted.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.DeleteResult
member.summary: Result returned after deleting a single document by ID.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.DeleteResult.DeletedCount
member.summary: Number of documents deleted (0 or 1).

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.DeleteManyResult
member.summary: Result returned after deleting multiple documents.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.DeleteManyResult.DeletedCount
member.summary: Number of documents deleted.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.UpdateResult
member.summary: Result returned after updating a single document.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.UpdateResult.ModifiedCount
member.summary: Number of documents modified (0 or 1).

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.UpdateManyResult
member.summary: Result returned after updating multiple documents.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.UpdateManyResult.ModifiedCount
member.summary: Number of documents modified.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.FindResult
member.summary: Result returned when finding a single document.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.FindResult.Result
member.summary: The found document as a dictionary, or null if not found.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.Pagination
member.summary: Pagination metadata.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.Pagination.TotalItems
member.summary: Total number of items across all pages.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.Pagination.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.PaginationResult
member.summary: Paginated query result.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.PaginationResult.Results
member.summary: Array of result documents.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.PaginationResult.Page
member.summary: Current page number.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.PaginationResult.Size
member.summary: Number of items per page.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.PaginationResult.Pagination
member.summary: Pagination metadata.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.AggregateResult
member.summary: Aggregation pipeline result.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.AggregateResult.Results
member.summary: Array of aggregated result documents.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InitResult
member.summary: Result returned from the initialization endpoint.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InitResult.Unix
member.summary: Server's current Unix timestamp in seconds.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.InitResult.IsSafeMode
member.summary: Whether the server has safe mode enabled.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for initializing a T1YOS client.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL of the t1yOS server. Defaults to https://myapp.t1y.net.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.AppId
member.summary: Application ID (must be >= 1001).

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.ApiKey
member.summary: API key (must be exactly 32 characters).

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.SecretKey
member.summary: Secret key for request signing (must be exactly 32 characters).

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.Version
member.summary: API version. Defaults to 0.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.IsSafeMode
member.summary: Whether to enable safe mode (AES-256-GCM payload encryption). Defaults to false.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.TimeFormat
member.summary: Time format for timestamp localization. Defaults to "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss".

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig.Offset
member.summary: Time offset in seconds for request signing. Defaults to 0.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig
member.summary: Internal configuration with all defaults resolved.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.BaseUrl
member.summary: Resolved base URL (no trailing slash).

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.AppId
member.summary: Validated application ID.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.ApiKey
member.summary: Validated API key.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.SecretKey
member.summary: Validated secret key.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.Version
member.summary: Resolved API version.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.IsSafeMode
member.summary: Resolved safe mode flag.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.TimeFormat
member.summary: Resolved time format string.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSInternalConfig.Offset
member.summary: Resolved time offset in seconds.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.HttpMethod
member.summary: Supported HTTP methods for API requests.

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.HttpMethod.GET
member.summary: HTTP GET

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.HttpMethod.POST
member.summary: HTTP POST

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.HttpMethod.PUT
member.summary: HTTP PUT

member.name: F:T1YOS.Sdk.Types.HttpMethod.DELETE
member.summary: HTTP DELETE

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.ConvertHelper
member.summary: Type conversion utilities for the T1YOS SDK. Handles conversion of C# DateTime objects and numeric timestamps into the special marker strings that the t1yOS server understands.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.ConvertHelper.ConvertDateTypes(System.Object)
member.summary:
Recursively converts DateTime objects and timestamp numbers into special marker strings recognized by the t1yOS server.
Rules: - objects become Date('ISO-8601') marker strings. - values with 10+ digits become Timestamp('unix') markers. - objects are traversed recursively. - Arrays and lists are traversed recursively. - All other values are returned unchanged.
member.returns: The converted value with Date/Timestamp markers applied.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.ConvertHelper.IsNonEmptyObject(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a value is a non-null, non-array dictionary with at least one key.
member.returns: True if the value is a non-empty object (dictionary).

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.ConvertHelper.IsPlainObject(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a value is a non-null dictionary (may be empty).
member.returns: True if the value is a plain object (dictionary).

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.ConvertHelper.IsNonEmptyArrayWithNonEmptyObjects(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a value is a non-empty array where every element is a non-empty dictionary.
member.returns: True if the value is a non-empty array of non-empty objects.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.T1YError
member.summary: Represents an error returned by the t1yOS API.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.T1YError.Code
member.summary: HTTP status code or error code from the server.

member.name: P:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.T1YError.ErrorData
member.summary: Optional response data payload associated with the error.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.T1YError.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new T1YError instance.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.T1YError.ToString
member.summary: Returns a JSON-like string representation of the error.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.ValidationError
member.summary: Represents a configuration validation error.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.ValidationError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new ValidationError instance.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.TimeHelper
member.summary: Time formatting utilities for the T1YOS SDK. Handles conversion of server UTC timestamps to local time format.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.TimeHelper.FormatTimestampsToLocal(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary:
Recursively formats createdAt and updatedAt fields from UTC strings to local time using the specified format.
Format tokens: YYYY = year, MM = month, DD = day, HH = hour, mm = minute, ss = second.
member.param: Custom time format string. Defaults to "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss".
member.returns: The data structure with timestamps formatted to local time.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.TimeHelper.FormatDateString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Formats a UTC date string to local time using the specified format pattern.
member.param: UTC date string to parse and format.
Custom format with YYYY, MM, DD, HH, mm, ss tokens.
member.returns: Local time formatted string, or the original string if parsing fails.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.UrlHelper
member.summary: URL utility functions for the T1YOS SDK.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.UrlHelper.NormalizeBaseUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a base URL by removing trailing slashes.
member.returns: Normalized base URL without trailing slashes.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.UrlHelper.AppendQueryParams(System.UriBuilder,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Appends query parameters to a URI builder. Null values are skipped; non-string values are serialized as JSON.

member.name: T:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.Validators
member.summary: Validation utilities for the T1YOS SDK configuration and data.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.Validators.ValidateAppId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that the application ID is >= 1001.
member.exception: Thrown if appId is less than 1001.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.Validators.ValidateApiKey(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the API key is exactly 32 characters.
member.exception: Thrown if apiKey is not 32 characters.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.Validators.ValidateSecretKey(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the secret key is exactly 32 characters.
member.exception: Thrown if secretKey is not 32 characters.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.Validators.ValidateBaseUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the base URL starts with http:// or https://.
member.exception: Thrown if baseUrl is missing required protocol.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.Validators.ValidateInitConfig(T1YOS.Sdk.Types.T1YOSConfig)
member.summary: Validates all required fields in a T1YOSConfig object.
member.exception: Thrown if any required field is invalid.

member.name: M:T1YOS.Sdk.Utils.Validators.AssertObjectID(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a string is a valid 24-character hexadecimal ObjectID.
member.param: Optional name for the error message.
member.returns: True if the ObjectID is valid.
member.exception: Thrown if the string is not a valid ObjectID.
